title: Fathom.AI Call Content Production Workflow
description: Organize Fathom.AI coaching/sales calls for Donald to review 3 daily, enabling consistent content production ready for editing by 12 PM daily.
full_idea: Remember to go through every single coaching call and Sales call that I’ve done and recorded with fathom.AI and give every single one of those links to Donald and have him go through this list three videos at a time daily so that I have consistent content production that at 12 PM is ready for me to edit so that when I have lunchtime I can edit this content and get this posted every day.
source_text: Remember to go through every single coaching call and Sales call that I’ve done and recorded with fathom.AI and give every single one of those links to Donald and have him go through this list three videos at a time daily so that I have consistent content production that at 12 PM is ready for me to edit so that when I have lunchtime I can edit this content and get this posted every day.
